cases.non_goal_rationale: Non-goal for Python port: these tests enforce JS package import-time version skew checks between `react` and `react-dom/*` entrypoints. In this repo, `ryact`/`ryact-dom` compatibility is handled by Python packaging and dependency constraints rather than runtime import guards, and there is no direct analogue to the JS module entrypoint matrix.
